name: Yaar Chale Bahar
overview: After the huge success of Punjab's first ever Web Series "Yaar Jigree Kasooti Degree" Troll Punjabi is back with a whole new series revolving around Ielts World "Yaar Chale Bahar"  The show explores lives of a group of children studying for ILETS

trailers.title: Yaar Chale Bahar  | Official Trailer | Punjabi Web Series 2022
